text:
Tethered Together
Tethered Together describes itself as an event focused on rope bondage, with additional programming in circus arts, kink, relationships, and body movement such as dance and yoga. Along with educational workshops, it hosts attendee-led programming, art installations, and entertainment. It also says it provides a fully equipped sex-positive dungeon on Friday, Saturday, and Sunday nights. The site currently announces the next event for March 12 through 15, 2027 and says ticket sales begin in the fall.
title: Tethered Together
